html:
We’re excited to announce that Revolv3 has been selected as part of the 2024 FinTech Innovation Lab Cohort by 1871! This program brings together 47 founders, leaders, and innovators from across the globe, representing major cities in the United States, Canada, and Argentina, to tackle the most pressing challenges in the FinTech sector.

The cohort will focus on key areas such as Payments, Banking, and Emerging FinTech, while also exploring critical topics like Cyber-Security Innovations, Frictionless B2C Payments, and Digital Banking.

Throughout the program, participants will benefit from tailored programming, exposure to corporate innovators and VCs, networking opportunities with industry leaders, and much more.

We're thrilled to be part of this dynamic group and look forward to leveraging this opportunity to continue driving payment innovation. Keep an eye out for updates as we collaborate with global FinTech leaders!

About Revolv3  

Revolv3 is a payments company with a cutting-edge SaaS optimization platform that revolutionizes billing for card-on-file merchants. By leveraging adaptive technology, Revolv3 ensures the industry's highest credit card approval rates, resulting in increased revenue, reduced churn, and improved cost efficiency.
